ocr_findings.description: OCR renders the TOB label as 'フィオービー' (line 7-8) and MBO as 'エムピーター' (lines 10-12). The image shows these as ruby/furigana annotations (small phonetic text above the acronym). OCR has captured them as standalone text fragments before the term, garbling 'テイクオーバービッド' → 'フィオービー' and 'マネジメントバイアウト' → 'エムピーター'. These phonetic readings are wrong characters that do not appear in the image as written text in that form.
The TOB and MBO table rows each have the furigana fragment on a separate line within the cell rather than being cleanly formatted, causing minor structural noise in the markdown table.

reviewer_notes: Page covers M&A-related terms table and マーケティング introductory content plus the 4P/マーケティングミックス section with Honda 4P table. The main body text and both tables are well-captured. The key defect is the ruby/furigana phonetic readings for TOB and MBO acronyms being OCR'd as garbled katakana strings ('フィオービー', 'エムピーター') instead of the correct readings ('テイクオーバービッド', 'マネジメントバイアウト'). This changes the phonetic annotation meaning but does not affect the core term definitions.
